You know, that's, it's a device where you are looking at the camera. Well, it's something that fits in front of your camera and it's, and it will have your script on the camera. So you're looking at your script, but you're actually the camera is right behind the script and you can read the script while you're looking straight into the camera. And they're pretty darn cool. And I've got one and I use one and I like it. I'll get a little more into that a little later on. If you want to shoot outside, teleprompters really don't work very well outside. For a, well, first of all, you need a long extension cord depending on where you're at, but then it's usually just too bright to be able to really read the teleprompters. There are some that work outside, but they tend to be a lot more expensive. And so just for the most part, teleprompters don't work outside all that well.
